summary: Certificazioni CE Module (EN 1090 / EN 13241) - Complete testing of backend CRUD + PDF generation and frontend 3-step wizard. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: landing page updated to 'CRM per Fabbri', sidebar shows 'Certificazioni CE', wizard steps navigate correctly, EN 1090 and EN 13241 show different technical spec fields, save creates certification, PDF download works.

issues: Text 'lavoro legale quotidiano' was inconsistent with metalworking CRM theme - FIXED

backend.GET /api/certificazioni/: PASS - Returns list with pagination and status filter
backend.POST /api/certificazioni/: PASS - Creates certification with auto-generated declaration number
backend.PUT /api/certificazioni/{cert_id}: PASS - Updates certification fields and status
backend.DELETE /api/certificazioni/{cert_id}: PASS - Deletes certification and returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend.GET /api/certificazioni/{cert_id}/fascic: PASS - Returns application/pdf with DOP + CE Label content
backend.Technical specs defaults: PASS - EXC2, Classe C3, A1 fire reaction
backend.All execution classes: PASS - EXC1, EXC2, EXC3, EXC4 accepted

frontend.Landing page badge: PASS - Shows 'CRM per Fabbri e Carpenterie'
frontend.Feature cards: PASS - Shows Distinta Materiali, Rilievi in Cantiere, Certificazioni CE
frontend.Sidebar Certificazioni CE link: PASS - Shows Shield icon with 'Certificazioni CE' text
frontend.Certificazioni list page: PASS - Shows table with columns Progetto, Norma, Tipo Prodotto, N. DOP, Cliente, Stato
frontend.Empty state: PASS - Shows 'Nessuna certificazione trovata' with create button
frontend.Wizard Step 1: PASS - Project name, client select, distinta select, product type, description
frontend.Wizard Step 3 EN 1090: PASS - Shows Execution Class, Reaction to Fire, NO gate-specific fields
frontend.Wizard Step 3 EN 13241: PASS - Shows Mechanical Resistance, Safe Opening, Air Permeability, Water Tightness, Wind Resistance
frontend.Save certification: PASS - Creates certification and shows success message
frontend.Generate PDF button: PASS - Visible after save, opens PDF in new tab
frontend.Dropdown menu: PASS - Shows Modifica, Scarica PDF, Elimina options

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Landing page features section mentioned 'lavoro legale' (legal work) instead of metalworking
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed text to 'gestione della tua officina' (workshop management)

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test users and sessions for both pytest and Playwright testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificazioni CE Module fully tested and working. Backend CRUD + PDF generation all pass. Frontend wizard with 3 steps works correctly - EN 1090-1 shows execution class/fire reaction fields, EN 13241 shows gate-specific fields (air permeability, water tightness, wind resistance). Minor text fix on landing page. No API mocking used - all integrations are real.
mocked_api_note: None - all APIs are fully implemented
